original: Laser weapons have been popular weapons for spacecraft ever since the solar system was first explored. Laser weapons do not require the expenditure of mass for ammunition, and in the void of space, their focused beams can travel extreme distances in a flash. Of course, like all pure-energy weapons, lasers require a high amount of energy to fire.
